mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.destination_id, p.title, p.sub_title, p.rules, p.pay_value, p.actual_value, p.type, p.status, sp.stock, sp.begin_time, sp.end_time FROM tb_travel_package p LEFT JOIN tb_seckill_package sp ON p.id = sp.package_id WHERE p.destination_id = #{destinationId} AND p.status = 1
